name: dashboard-realtime-status

checklist.summary: User replied "pass", confirming the checklist is accepted for todolist creation.

notes: Requirement directory name was generated from the product concept because the user did not provide an explicit requirement name.
Product clarification round 2 answers were received: B, A, B, B, A+B.
Review completed with no blocking product or technical issue. Checklist is drafted and waiting for user confirmation.
User added implementation packaging constraint: prefer a new JS file and a new Python file, keeping existing large files limited to thin integration hooks.
User added UI visibility constraint: the control panel should show whether it is using SSE, reconnecting SSE, or polling fallback.
Checklist confirmed by user reply "pass" and todolist was created.
Implementation completed with focused app/dashboard_realtime.py and app/dashboard-realtime.js modules.
Automated checks passed; waiting for user test acceptance confirmation before marking tested.
Temporary local service and in-app browser validation confirmed /api/dashboard/events snapshot+heartbeat and visible SSE connected indicator.
After stopping the temporary local service, in-app browser validation confirmed the dashboard switches to the visible polling fallback indicator.
Additional automated coverage now verifies meetings/actions diff events and filters routine/resolved/approved items out of action-required events.
